name: Puffer
subtitle: Puffco Proxy utilities
description: Apps for connecting to and controlling a Puffco Proxy.

apps.name: Puffer
apps.subtitle: Connect to and control your Puffco Proxy.
apps.localizedDescription: Discover, pair with, and control a Puffco Proxy over Bluetooth, including heat profiles, device settings, and live session metrics.

privacy.NSBluetoothAlwaysUsageDescription: Allow Puffer to connect to and control your Puffco Proxy.
privacy.NSLocalNetworkUsageDescription: Expo Dev Launcher uses the local network to discover and connect to development servers running on your computer.
